scoring_logic.scoring_rules_note: proto_v0 engine uses approved scoring rules from bsip2_concept_v1 + SRC-v1. No new scoring rules introduced for this category — existing rules applied as-is. No D7 approval required for rule modification (no rules were modified).

label_observability.fat_in_dry_matter_pct: present for 33/37 products where applicable (4 processed cheese products do not carry dry-matter labeling by convention)

rollback_plan.prior_state: Category hard_cheeses did not previously exist on frontend. This is a new category launch — rollback is file removal from bari-web/src/data/comparisons/. No existing scores to revert.
rollback_triggers: governance override from Nutrition Agent or Product Agent

alignment_check_3_products.evidence: Gouda28%=70.8/B > YellowLight16%=39.0/D > Processed=32.0/E — all in expected range

evidence_registry_entries.description: Fat per 100g vs fat-in-dry-matter: 33 products with dual labeling documented in curation_report.json. Scoring uses fat_per_100g only.
Alignment check: 3 archetypes scored before full corpus. Gouda 28%=70.8/B > Light 16%=39.0/D > Processed=32.0/E. PASS.
Engine category misroute to 'dessert' for 20 products: documented as expected artifact of proto_v0 engine lacking hard_cheeses category. Zero score impact.
Red-team challenge: 4 HIGH findings, 0 CRITICAL. All closed with accepted rationale.

gate_decision: PASS — all acceptance criteria met, red-team cleared, QA gate passed with accepted warnings. Frontend JSON deployed. Category ready for go-live review by Product Agent.
